name: ModifyCulturalHeritage
description: Change data of a cultural object in the system.
postconditions: The notification system has been changing the data of the cultural.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

UC3: View the list of cultural goods as a result of the use case SearchCulturalHeritage, it selects and activates a function of change.
Load the data of the cultural and displays the form for editing.
Change data in the form and submit.
Verify the data entered and asks for confirmation of the transaction. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Stores the modified data of the cultural.

quality_requirements: The system requirements blocks of input controls in the form once we receive confirmation of the change to avoid multiple submissions before the end of the operation.
